sources.title: Stigma ( 1972) Philip Michael Thomas
sources.description: A knowledgeable doctor moves to a secluded community and soon discovers a deadly virus changing the town's young people. What is more disturbing is the conspiracy to protect this epidemic when he tries cure it.

metadata.Plot: A young couple move into a remote country house in the middle of a stone circle. They employ workmen who disturb an ancient menhir, unleashing a supernatural force.
metadata.Actors: Kate Binchy, Peter Bowles, Maxine Gordon
